description: Standard: fintech article for general reader

input.draft: The firm's DeFi protocol leverages smart contracts to facilitate yield farming across multiple liquidity pools. Users can stake their tokens to earn APY through an automated market maker. The TVL has exceeded $2 billion since the protocol's mainnet launch, driven by institutional DeFi adoption and cross-chain bridge integrations.

description: Minimal: short passage with one jargon term

input.draft: The hospital performed 200 laparoscopic procedures last quarter.

description: European: EU policy article for general reader

input.draft: The trilogue negotiations on the AI Act reached provisional agreement after the European Parliament's rapporteurs secured concessions on biometric surveillance from the Council presidency. The regulation introduces a risk-based framework with conformity assessments for high-risk AI systems and sandboxes for innovation. Member states will transpose the regulation through national implementing measures, with the European AI Office providing technical guidance and coordinating market surveillance across the single market.
